intro: Seize Victory with 5 Elements and a Strategic Mana System!
description:
Play or Sacrifice? The Ultimate Choice Awaits in this Competitive Card Game!

CardQuest -SimpleCardGame- creates a fusion of simple rules and deep strategic gameplay. Its defining feature is a unique resource system: you must sacrifice cards from your hand to generate Mana. Will you sacrifice your hand to unleash powerful cards, or will you play it safe with a steady offense? Your decision-making skills will be put to the test.

Battles heat up with 5 elemental affinities—Fire, Water, Nature, Earth, and Wind—and stunning full-screen visual effects for all 25 cards. Seize victory under the high-stakes pressure of "Mana Starvation," where running out of resources means instant defeat!
